summary: Frontend visual and functional testing for localsocial React Native app. Verified core features: registration, login, home feed, business dashboard, event creation with date/time pickers, location management. Minor issues found with session persistence and View Public Profile navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation to /user/undefined when clicking 'View public profile' button - user_id might not be populated in auth context immediately

integration_issues.issue: Session expires quickly requiring frequent re-login during testing. App shows loading spinner when session token is invalid/expired.

issues: Good design - proper spacing, clear sections for Events, Businesses, Artists, Stories, Create Post
Well-structured layout with clear sections for Profile management, Content creation, Events, Contact info, Media & Branding, Business Location, Opening Hours
Clean modal design with proper date/time pickers showing calendar/clock icons

registration_login.notes: User registration and login flow works correctly. Form fields fill properly, navigation to home feed after successful auth.

home_feed.notes: Home feed displays all sections: Events (with Open calendar link), Businesses (multiple businesses with categories), Artists (multiple artists with locations), Stories (with Add story button and existing stories), Create post section. Bottom navigation tabs all present.

business_dashboard.notes: Business Dashboard shows: Profile management (Edit business info, Open public profile), Content creation (text input, Photo/Video buttons, Publish story), Events section with Add event button, Contact info, Media & Branding with Add Photo/Video, Business Location with Set location button, Opening Hours section.

event_creation_datetime_pickers.notes: Event creation modal has: Event title, Description, Event Date picker (shows date like 2/12/2026 with calendar icon), Event Time picker (shows time like 10:05 AM with clock icon), Location field, Upload event photo, Publish event button. DateTimePicker from @react-native-community/datetimepicker is correctly implemented.

location_based_home_feed.notes: getHomeFeed() in api.ts correctly passes latitude, longitude, and max_distance_km as query parameters to /feed/home endpoint.

video_upload_fix.notes: uploadMedia() in api.ts correctly passes resource_type as a form data parameter instead of query parameter (line 341-343).

business_location_picker.notes: handleGetCurrentLocation() in business-dashboard.tsx correctly requests location permissions, gets GPS coordinates, and reverse geocodes to address.

opening_hours_management.notes: Opening hours section with toggleDayEnabled, updatePeriod, addPeriod, removePeriod, and saveOpeningHours functions all implemented correctly.

clickable_friends.notes: Friends in profile.tsx are wrapped in Pressable with onPress={() => router.push('/user/{friend.user_id}')} navigation.

message_button_on_user_profile.notes: Message button in user/[id].tsx navigates to /(tabs)/messages/[id] with user ID and name params.

story_deletion.notes: handleDeleteStory() in home.tsx shows confirmation alert and calls deleteStory() API on confirmation.

action_items: MEDIUM: Fix View Public Profile navigation issue - ensure user_id is available in auth context before rendering the button
LOW: Investigate session timeout/persistence to improve user experience during longer sessions
critical_code_review_comments: Video upload fix correctly implemented - resource_type now in form data parameters
Location-based feed correctly passes coordinates to backend API
DateTimePicker implementation uses native components as expected
GPS location picker with reverse geocoding properly requests permissions
Opening hours management with add/remove period functionality well implemented
Friend navigation and message button implementations are correct

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Most features verified working, one navigation bug identified

test_credentials.note: Can also create new users via registration flow

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend is functional. Key features verified through UI testing and code review. The session persistence issue may require investigation - tokens seem to expire quickly. The View Public Profile button navigates to /user/undefined which suggests the user_id may not be populated in the auth context user object. Backend tests passed in iteration 2 (44/44).

view_public_profile_undefined.root_cause: The user object from AuthContext may not have user_id populated when the profile page renders. This could be a timing issue where the user data hasn't fully loaded.
view_public_profile_undefined.reproduction_steps: 1. Login as any user 2. Navigate to Profile tab 3. Click 'View public profile' button 4. Observe URL shows /user/undefined
view_public_profile_undefined.mitigation: Add a guard condition to disable the button when user?.user_id is undefined, or ensure user data is fully loaded before rendering
